text: I find myself in a tranquil, modern space—glass, color, and technology blending into a curated environment. The R+D wall stirs my curiosity, an invitation to contemplate humanity’s dance with intelligent machines. There is a sense of wonder mingled with an undercurrent of anticipation, as if I am on the threshold of new understanding. Yet I feel slightly out of place and detached, as though a silent question hangs in the air: How do I fit into this evolving relationship between mind and machine?
